186.code: return new Token(string, TokenType.OR, line, ErrorType.a);
186.reason: [Error: TokenType should not be OR for a single '|'; it should only be OR for "||". Similarly for '&'. The error type is correctly set to 'a', but assigning TokenType.OR/AND is incorrect because single '|' and '&' are not valid tokens and should not map to OR/AND token types. This leads to wrong token output instead of proper error reporting.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: TokenType should not be OR for a single '|'; it should only be OR for "||". Similarly for '&'. The error type is correctly set to 'a', but assigning TokenType.OR/AND is incorrect because single '|' and '&' are not valid tokens and should not map to OR/AND token types. This leads to wrong token output instead of proper error reporting.]

189.code: return new Token(string, TokenType.AND, line, ErrorType.a);
189.reason: [Same issue: single '&' is an error and should not produce an AND token. The token type must not be AND/OR for single symbols; only the error should be reported.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: single '&' is an error and should not produce an AND token. The token type must not be AND/OR for single symbols; only the error should be reported.]
